description:
Base / Home Port: Bali, Indonesia
Operating Area: Indonesia

A new day has begun for Mutiara Laut, bringing with it a new luxurious space to experience the wild beauty and natural wonders unique to Indonesia.

A classic 46m wooden yacht crafted to sail the far reaches of the vast archipelago, Mutiara Laut underwent an extensive refit, a reinvention, emerging with a fresh take and elevating the classic Indonesian voyage.

Mutiara Laut presents guests with a relaxed, luxurious elegance combining natural hues, glass, and contemporary Indonesian touches while focusing on space, optimal comfort, and privacy.

blueprint.name: MUTIARA LAUT
blueprint.make: Leendert Philippus Van Oostenbrugge / Frenty Kusumo

crew.name: Nico Bony Arizona
crew.bio: Captain Nico Bony Arizona, originating from Malang, East Java, boasts an impressive 13 years of maritime experience. His steadfast dedication to safety and extensive knowledge make him a respected leader at sea. Captain Arizona’s mentorship and commitment to passing on seafaring traditions benefit the entire crew. He is an invaluable asset to any vessel he commands.

crew.name: Arie Pagaka
crew.bio:
Arie Pagaka, a Cruise Director with over two decades of experience, is known for his unwavering dedication, integrity, and teamwork in the industry. A passionate explorer, he prefers hands-on interaction with local cultures and takes pride in unveiling hidden gems to create unique experiences for guests. Arie’s multilingual proficiency in English, French,
and Indonesian enriches his ability to connect with a diverse range of travelers, while his love for nature and Flora and Fauna knowledge add depth to his tours.

crew.name: Karim Mosiba
crew.bio: Chief Officer Karim Mosiba, hailing from Gorontalo, brings 11 years of invaluable maritime experience to the crew. Karim’s dedication to safety and precision in his duties ensure smooth operations at sea. With Chief Officer Karim Mosiba on deck, the vessel is in capable hands.

crew.name: Jedik Oscar
crew.bio: Second Officer Jedik Oscar, with an impressive 24 years of maritime experience, originates from the coastal town of Malang in East Java. With a proven track record of safety and precision, Officer Oscar ensures smooth operations at sea. With Second Officer Jedik Oscar on board, the vessel benefits from decades of maritime wisdom.

crew.name: Lambok Maruli Tua
crew.bio: Hailing from Batam Riau, Chief Engineer Lambok Maruli Tua brings 11 years of marine engineering experience. His expertise and meticulous maintenance ensure top-notch ship performance. Tua ensures to keep the engine room in capable hands.

crew.name: Wahyu Ardiyanto
crew.bio: Wahyu Ardiyanto, a seasoned professional in the realm of marine engineering, proudly calls Temanggung, Central Java, his home. With an illustrious career spanning over 12 years, Wahyu’s expertise and dedication play a pivotal role in the seamless functioning of the ship’s intricate systems.

crew.name: Surahman
crew.bio: Hailing from the picturesque region of Faros in Sulawesi Selatan, Surahman brings with him a wealth of experience in marine engineering, accumulating an impressive 5 years in this demanding field.

crew.name: Achmad Aidin
crew.bio: Achmad Aidin, from Gresik, Jawa Timur, boasts an impressive 25 years of maritime experience, serving as a skilled First Able Seaman and proficient Tender Boat Driver. His extensive expertise ensures the crew’s safety and the efficiency of maritime operations.

crew.name: Nurfaizal Izal
crew.bio: Hailing from Bulukumba in Sulawesi Selatan, Nurfaizal Izal brings 7 years of maritime experience to the role of First Able Seaman and proficient Tender Boat Driver. His skill and expertise contribute to the smooth and safe operation of maritime activities on board.

crew.name: Suherman Toni
crew.bio: Suherman Toni, representing Sumbawa, contributes 4 years of maritime experience as a skilled First Able Seaman and adept Tender Boat Driver. His expertise plays a vital role in ensuring the efficiency and safety of maritime operations.

crew.name: Kadek Roniawan Putra
crew.bio: Hailing from the vibrant city of Denpasar in Bali, Kadek Roniawan Putra brings 8 years of culinary expertise to the crew. As the ship’s Chef, Kadek ensures that every meal served is a delightful experience for all on board. His culinary finesse and dedication to his craft elevate the dining experience, making him an essential to you voyage.

crew.name: Bonefasius Benjamin - Efas
crew.bio: Originating from Manggarai, Timur, Bonefasius Benjamin , also known as Efas is a culinary veteran with 9 years of experience under his belt. As the Second Chef, Efas brings his culinary prowess to the ship’s kitchen, ensuring that every meal is a gastronomic delight. His dedication and expertise contribute to the overall culinary excellence on board.

crew.name: Aleksander Paju - Lexy
crew.bio: Meet Aleksander Paju, the Room Boy on Mutiara Laut, hailing from the scenic Manggarai, Timur region. With 11 years of experience in hospitality, he’s renowned for his unwavering dedication to ensuring guests aboard the yacht Mutiara Laut enjoy a comfortable and luxurious stay.

crew.name: Agus Susanto
crew.bio: Agus Susanto, originating from Sumbawa, brings 4 years of experience to the role of Room Boy / Service. His dedication and proficiency enhance the comfort and service quality on board.

crew.name: Patrisius Yohanes
crew.bio: Hailing from Manggarai, Timur, Patrisius Yohanes brings 5 years of experience to the role of Room Boy / Service. His dedication and proficiency enhance the overall comfort and quality of service on board.

crew.name: Angelus Sustrino Kaki Tani
crew.bio: Angelus Sustrino Kaki Tani, hailing from Manggarai, Timur, brings 6 years of expertise as a Dive Master. His experience ensures safe and enjoyable underwater exploration, making him an invaluable member of the team.

lineItems.conditions: per night for up to 14 passengers

pricingInfo.name: Shared Voyages: Owner’s Cabin with Private Terrace – 1 unit
